name: More and profile settings card refactor
description: Refactored protected More and Profile Settings into mobile-first shadcn card compositions wrapped by the shared PageShell. More now uses wrapping icon-and-arrow shortcut rows with root package version footer. Profile Settings now shows avatar, readonly account details/profile security with Firebase password change, and danger-zone account action rows with AlertDialog confirmations and no household membership section.

evidence.description: More page uses PageShell for the route title/header, imports the root package version, and renders the shortcut card plus version footer.
Shortcut-list card with left icons, right arrows, separators, wrapping labels/descriptions for narrow widths, and no keyboard shortcut key pills.

Profile Settings orchestrator renders loading, error, and success states inside PageShell, with avatar, profile details/security, and danger-zone account actions cards without tabs or household membership data.
Frontend guide documents PageShell as the route-level app page layout contract and routes shell details to the responsive navigation shell reference.
Reusable ref-based confirm dialog built on shadcn AlertDialog with async confirm handling, destructive button variant support, busy-state dismissal guard, cancel cleanup, and explicit button types.
Firebase helpers reauthenticate the current email/password user before changing password or deleting the Firebase sign-in account.
Session-service functions expose Firebase password change and delete the Firebase user before best-effort backend logout/local session cleanup.
Profile details card includes an active password-change form using passwordChangeSchema, autocomplete hints, and Firebase session-service action.
Account actions render danger-zone row buttons with icons, descriptions, arrows, AlertDialog confirmations, and password-gated Firebase account deletion.

evidence.command: pnpm --filter web exec vitest run src/lib/auth/firebase-auth.test.ts
evidence.description: Focused source-contract and Firebase auth tests cover More wrapping, PageShell usage, AlertDialog-based confirmation, danger-zone account rows, active password form, and Firebase reauth/update/delete helpers.
Repository lint verification passed after implementation and review fixes.
Repository typecheck verification passed after implementation and review fixes.
Final full verification passed, including install, harness, lint, typecheck, test, and GitNexus sync steps.

evidence.command: playwright-cli mocked browser session against http://localhost:3000/more and /settings
evidence.description: More showed four wrapping icon/arrow shortcut rows and version 0.1.0. Settings showed avatar, account details/password form, and danger-zone cards with no households; sign-out and Firebase delete rows opened alert dialogs, and delete required a current password before enabling confirm.

evidence.output: unavailable: MCP connection closed / Not connected after ./init.sh sync and final ./init.sh
evidence.description: Required GitNexus impact/change checks were attempted but the MCP connection remained unavailable after sync.
